meaning: n.(修女、中世纪妇女用来遮掩颈部的)白麻巾
examples: And Jim Barbe, a New Orleans psychiatrist, says that in recent months, many of his own patients seem to have lost hope.
"As the months have worn on, there has been a lot more depression and a lot more suicidal ideation in the patients that I am seeing, " Barbe says.
